name: Chime
description: Brass and silver wind chimes hanging into the dusk — tubes lengthen, clappers drift, and every redraw stills a new chord.

code.style: --tube: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3)); --tl: @rand(36%, 74%); --tx: @rand(26%, 58%); --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: var(--tx); top: 0; width: 11%; height: var(--tl); border-radius: 0 0 99px 99px; background: var(--tube); transition: ease 700ms; } } @random(0.4) { :after { content: ''; position: absolute; @size: 10%; left: @rand(30%, 56%); top: @rand(76%, 86%); border-radius: 50%; background: var(--color3); opacity: 0.85; transition: ease 700ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
